hero.badge: Works on Chrome • Offline-first • No tracking
hero.h1: AdShield Pro — Next-Gen Ad Blocking & Privacy Protection
hero.intro1: Welcome to AdShield Pro — your ultimate solution for ad-free, fast, and private browsing. In a world filled with intrusive ads, hidden trackers, and slow-loading pages, AdShield Pro gives you back control of your web experience — without compromising your privacy.
hero.intro2: Whether you want to block ads, remove trackers, speed up your browsing, or protect your personal data from prying eyes, AdShield Pro delivers powerful protection that runs locally on your device — no cloud servers, no third-party tracking, and no hidden data collection.
hero.intro3: 👉 Clean browsing. Faster pages. Total privacy. That's the AdShield Pro promise.

related.heading: Explore more
related.sub: Jump to key pages to learn more about features, pricing, privacy, and support.

cards.label: Features
cards.desc: Total ad blocking, tracker protection, and customization.

cards.desc: Free version vs Pro lifetime upgrade (one-time purchase).

blockAds.h2: 🚫 Block Ads Everywhere — On All Websites
blockAds.intro: Ads are everywhere — from banner ads on news sites to pop-ups on blogs and pre-roll video ads on streaming platforms. They clutter your screen, distract your attention, and steal your time.
blockAds.card1Heading: AdShield Pro stops ads at the source:
blockAds.card2Body: Unlike simple blockers that rely on dated lists, AdShield Pro uses a smart, rule-based filtering engine that works entirely offline for faster, more reliable blocking — without sending your data to any third-party servers.

stopTrackers.intro: Most websites today come loaded with invisible trackers that follow you from site to site, building profiles of your interests and behavior. These trackers invade your privacy, slow down your browsing, and can even expose sensitive data.

features.heading: Blocks third-party trackers
features.body: Analytics scripts, ad network trackers, social media monitors, and more.

features.heading: Prevents data leakage
features.body: Your browsing data stays on your device — never sent to remote servers.

features.heading: Zero tracking, zero telemetry
features.body: AdShield Pro does not collect, store, or transmit your browsing data — guaranteed.

stopTrackers.outro1: This means your search history, visited sites, and online behavior remain fully private.

faster.h2: ⏱️ Faster Browsing — Less Clutter, More Speed
faster.intro: Ads and trackers don't just annoy — they slow down your browser. Each ad banner, script, or tracking pixel adds extra load time, increasing data consumption and decreasing performance.
faster.body: By blocking unwanted content before it loads, AdShield Pro makes your web experience smoother and more responsive — especially on slower connections or metered data plans.
benefits: Improved battery life on laptops & mobile

simple.h2: 🔧 Designed for Everyone — Simple, Yet Powerful
simple.intro: You don't have to be a tech expert to enjoy an ad-free and private web. AdShield Pro is built for users of all levels.

features.heading: One-Click Setup
features.body: Install and start blocking immediately — no complicated configurations.

features.heading: Per-Site Customization
features.body: Whitelist your favorite sites so you can support creators without suffering through intrusive ads elsewhere.

why.intro: There are many ad blockers available — but AdShield Pro stands out because it combines powerful blocking, strict privacy, and lightning-fast performance into one clean package:

reasons.heading: ✔ 100% Local, Offline Ad Blocking
reasons.body: No external servers, no cloud-based filtering, and no data uploads.

reasons.heading: ✔ Privacy First
reasons.body: No analytics, no trackers, no telemetry — ever.

reasons.heading: ✔ Works Everywhere
reasons.body: Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Opera – AdShield Pro works seamlessly across major browsers.

reasons.heading: ✔ One-Time Upgrade (Optional Pro)
reasons.body: Get premium features with a one-time purchase, not a recurring subscription. Lifetime access. No hidden fees.

reasons.heading: ✔ Full Customization
reasons.body: Advanced users can fine-tune blocking rules, manage filter lists, and control exactly how content is handled.

pro.h2: 🌟 Pro Features — Take Control Like a Power User
pro.intro: The free version of AdShield Pro already delivers essential ad blocking and privacy protection. But if you want advanced control and customization, upgrading to AdShield Pro (Premium) unlocks powerful additional tools:
pro.body: Best of all? Pro is a one-time purchase, not a subscription — you pay once and get lifetime access to all premium capabilities.

items.heading: 🔹 Advanced Custom Filter Rules
items.body: Design your own filter criteria to block or allow specific elements across sites.

items.heading: 🔹 Cosmetic Filtering
items.body: Remove visual clutter like large banners, sponsored boxes, and disruptive page elements.

items.heading: 🔹 Local Analytics & Insights
items.body: See how many ads and trackers have been blocked — all locally, without data leaving your device.

items.heading: 🔹 Enhanced Whitelist Management
items.body: Set rules per domain, subdomain, path, or even specific page elements.

items.heading: 🔹 Priority Support
items.body: Get priority assistance for issues, questions, and optimization.

howItWorks.h2: 🧠 How It Works — Fast, Local, and Efficient
howItWorks.intro: AdShield Pro uses an intelligent filtering engine that works offline on your device.

features.heading: Rule-Based Engine
features.body: Matches page elements and network requests against filter rules — all offline.

features.heading: Automatic Updates
features.body: Filter lists are regularly updated to keep up with new ad and tracking techniques.

howItWorks.outro: The result? Faster decisions, stronger privacy, stronger blocking — all while keeping your data secure and private.

benefits.intro: Here's what you'll experience once AdShield Pro is active:

cards.heading: 💡 Clean & Focused Web Pages
cards.body: No more ads interrupting your reading or watching experience.

cards.heading: 🚀 Faster Load Times
cards.body: Less clutter means pages open quickly.

cards.heading: 💰 Data Savings
cards.body: Reduced unwanted downloads — especially valuable on limited data plans.

cards.heading: 🖱️ More Space for Content
cards.body: With fewer ads and overlays, you see more of what you actually want.

browsers.intro: AdShield Pro supports all major Chromium-based browsers like:
browsers.outro1: And it also works on Mozilla Firefox with the same privacy-first, high-performance blocking you expect.
browsers.outro2: This means no matter what browser you choose, AdShield Pro helps you browse smarter.

audience.h2: 🌈 Beginner Friendly — Advanced Enough for Power Users
audience.intro: Whether you're new to ad blockers or you know exactly what you want, AdShield Pro adapts to your needs:

tiers.heading: For Beginners
tiers.body: Instant protection, easy toggles, minimal learning curve.

tiers.heading: For Advanced Users
tiers.body: Custom filters, detailed control, and deep configuration options.

audience.outro: You're in control — not your browser, and definitely not advertisers.

gettingStarted.heading: 📥 Getting Started Is Easy
gettingStarted.intro: You're just a few clicks away from a cleaner, faster, and more private web:
steps: Install AdShield Pro from the official website.
Customize settings if you want refined control.
Enjoy browsing without interruptions, trackers, or eye-sore ads.
gettingStarted.outro: No accounts, no logins, no subscriptions — just privacy and performance.

testimonials.intro: Users around the world trust AdShield Pro to protect their privacy, block ads, and speed up their browsing experience — and you can too.

quotes.text: "AdShield Pro transformed my browser — pages load faster and I don't see those annoying ads anymore."
quotes.author: Satisfied User

quotes.text: "I was tired of trackers following me around. AdShield Pro gives me peace of mind."
quotes.author: Privacy Conscious Browser

privacyBuiltIn.intro: At AdShield Pro, privacy isn't an add-on — it's a foundation:
items: No cloud access to your browsing
Your data stays on your device
privacyBuiltIn.outro: Unlike many competitors that sell user data or track behavior, AdShield Pro is strictly private by design.

faq.intro: Quick answers about pricing, privacy, and performance.

items.a: Yes — the basic ad blocking and privacy protection are completely free.
No — premium features are available for a one-time purchase, not a recurring subscription.
Absolutely not. AdShield Pro never collects or sends your personal browsing data.

items.q: Will it slow down my browser?
items.a: No — AdShield Pro runs locally and efficiently, increasing your browsing speed by removing unnecessary elements.

cta.body: Say goodbye to annoying ads, hidden trackers, slow page loads, and data-draining scripts — and say hello to clean browsing, strong privacy, faster web pages, and full control over your experience.
cta.summary1: AdShield Pro is more than just an ad blocker — it's a complete suite of tools designed to block ads and trackers, speed up browsing, protect your privacy, give you total control, and deliver premium features with a one-time upgrade.
cta.summary2: No subscriptions. No telemetry. No compromises. Just the best browsing experience — powered by you.

features.h1: 🌐 AdShield Pro Features – Total Ad Blocking & Privacy Protection
features.intro1: Welcome to AdShield Pro, the modern ad blocker and privacy extension designed to give you fast, clean, and secure browsing — without tracking, subscriptions, or slowdowns. Built offline-first and running locally on your device, AdShield Pro puts you in complete control of what loads in your browser.
features.intro2: Whether you're tired of intrusive ads, want to stop trackers in their tracks, or simply want a smoother web experience, AdShield Pro delivers powerful features that protect your privacy and improve performance. Below, you'll find a complete breakdown of everything AdShield Pro can do — from core blocking right through to advanced customization and privacy protections.

support.intro: Get help with installation, Pro activation, troubleshooting, and account-free setup. If you need support, email us and we typically respond in 1–3 business days.

steps.heading: 1) Purchase on Gumroad
steps.body: Use the upgrade link on the Pricing page. Gumroad will provide your license key.

steps.heading: 2) Enter your license key in the extension
steps.body: Open AdShield Pro → Upgrade/License → paste the key → verify.

steps.heading: 3) Works offline after activation
steps.body: License verification is user-initiated. The result is stored locally on your device.

items.q: Extension not showing in the toolbar?
items.a: Chrome menu → Extensions → Pin AdShield Pro.

items.q: Ads still visible on a site?
items.a: Reload the page, check if the site is allowlisted, and confirm AdShield Pro is enabled for that tab.
Temporarily disable on that site or add it to your allowlist, then refresh.
Double-check for extra spaces, confirm you're using the latest extension version, and try verifying again. If it still fails, email support with your Gumroad receipt/order details.

items.q: Does AdShield Pro collect any data?
items.a: No personal data, no tracking, and no analytics. Settings are stored locally on your device.
You can upgrade any time from the Pricing page. Pro is a one-time purchase (no subscription).

howToBlockAds.h1: How to Block Ads on Chrome
howToBlockAds.intro: If you're looking for a simple way to reduce ads and improve browsing speed, installing a trusted ad blocker is the fastest option. Below is a quick, privacy-first setup using AdShield Pro.

steps.heading: 1) Install the extension
steps.body: Install AdShield Pro from the Chrome Web Store, then pin it so it's easy to access.

steps.heading: 2) Confirm blocking is enabled
steps.body: Open a site with ads and reload. If ads remain, check that the site is not allowlisted and that the extension is enabled for the tab.

steps.heading: 3) Customize per-site controls
steps.body: Some sites break when blocking is too aggressive. Use per-site controls to disable blocking or allowlist a site when needed, then refresh.

steps.heading: 4) Keep it private
steps.body: Choose tools that don't profile you. AdShield Pro is designed for offline-first, local-only filtering with no tracking or analytics.

related.body: If you're also trying to reduce tracking, see

cta.body: Install AdShield Pro and keep blocking local and private.

meta.title: How to Stop Trackers — Reduce Tracking in Your Browser
meta.description: Learn practical steps to stop trackers: block third-party scripts, limit cross-site tracking, and browse more privately using AdShield Pro's local-only protection.
meta.ogTitle: How to Stop Trackers — Reduce Tracking in Your Browser
meta.ogDescription: Practical steps to reduce trackers and third-party surveillance — privacy-first and local-only.

howToStopTrackers.intro: Trackers are invisible scripts and requests that follow you across websites. A good privacy setup reduces tracker requests, limits fingerprinting, and avoids tools that collect browsing telemetry.

steps.heading: 1) Block common tracker requests
steps.body: Use a privacy-first blocker that runs locally. AdShield Pro is designed for offline-first, local-only filtering so your browsing activity isn't shipped elsewhere.

steps.heading: 2) Reduce third-party cookies
steps.body: Browsers increasingly restrict third-party cookies, but you can still review your privacy settings and clear site data for services you don't trust.

steps.heading: 3) Avoid "free" tools that track you
steps.body: Many tools monetize by collecting usage analytics. Prefer extensions that clearly state "no tracking, no telemetry."

steps.heading: 4) Fix sites that break
steps.body: Some sites depend on third-party scripts. When something breaks, try disabling blocking for that site, then refresh.

related.body: Want to reduce ads too? See
related.howToBlock: How to Block Ads on Chrome

cta.body: Install AdShield Pro for local-only protection against common tracking requests.

meta.title: How to Fix Broken Sites After Ad Blocking (Allowlist & Per-Site Controls)
meta.description: If a website breaks after blocking ads or trackers, use per-site controls and allowlisting. Learn step-by-step troubleshooting with AdShield Pro.
meta.ogTitle: How to Fix Broken Sites After Ad Blocking (Allowlist & Per-Site Controls)
meta.ogDescription: Step-by-step troubleshooting: reload, disable blocking for a site, and use allowlisting to restore functionality.

howToFixSites.h1: How to Fix Broken Sites After Blocking
howToFixSites.intro: If a website doesn't load correctly after blocking ads/trackers, it usually depends on a third-party script. The fix is typically a quick per-site adjustment.

steps.heading: 1) Reload and check the extension state
steps.body: Reload the page first. Then confirm AdShield Pro is enabled for the current tab and the site isn't allowlisted.

steps.heading: 2) Disable blocking for that site
steps.body: If the site relies on blocked scripts, temporarily disable blocking for that site and refresh. This is the fastest way to confirm the cause.

steps.heading: 3) Use allowlisting when needed
steps.body: If you trust the site and it keeps breaking, add it to your allowlist so it always works. You can remove it later.

steps.heading: 4) Still stuck? Get help
steps.body: Some sites require more tuning. Use the support page for next steps and contact details.

related.body: To understand what's being blocked, see

cta.h2: Control per site, keep privacy local
cta.body: AdShield Pro gives you per-site controls so you can balance blocking and compatibility.
